Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Hmm, the user wants me to generate 20 open-ended questions based on a detailed supply chain description for smartphone manufacturing. The process is complex, involving multiple countries, suppliers, logistics, and digital systems.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I need to focus on insights, potential issues, improvement strategies, and decision implications. The questions should be thought-provoking and not answerable with simple yes/no.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: I can structure them around key areas: supplier dependencies, logistics challenges, quality control, sustainability, technology integration, risk management, and strategic decisions. Each question should encourage deeper analysis of the process described.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Let me brainstorm across these dimensions: geopolitical risks, lead time optimization, quality assurance across borders, carbon footprint reduction, AI/ML applications, inventory strategies, regulatory compliance, cost trade-offs, and future disruptions.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The user emphasized no SQL queries, so Ill avoid technical implementation questions. Instead, Ill keep them strategic and operational. The tone should be exploratory, inviting reflection on hidden complexities and opportunities.
